title: milligania densiflora
intro: Milligania densiflora, also known as the Australian box, is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Milligania densiflora include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a topical treatment for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Milligania densiflora may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
